read-update-pdf-metadata.title: Read and Update PDF Metadata using PdfFileInfo
read-update-pdf-metadata.description: Shows how to open a PDF, read its metadata, modify title, author, subject and keywords, and save the updated information to a new file using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileInfo facade.

read-pdf-author-metadata.title: Read PDF Author Metadata with Aspose.Pdf
read-pdf-author-metadata.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, retrieving the Author field from the document's information dictionary, and printing it to the console.

read-pdf-title-metadata-log.title: Read PDF Title Metadata and Write to Log
read-pdf-title-metadata-log.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileInfo to read the Title metadata from a PDF file and write the value to a log file.

retrieve-pdf-keywords-metadata.title: Retrieve PDF Keywords Metadata
retrieve-pdf-keywords-metadata.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileInfo to read the Keywords metadata from a PDF file and output it to the console.

read-pdf-creator-metadata.title: Read PDF Creator Metadata Using PdfFileInfo
read-pdf-creator-metadata.description: Shows how to retrieve the Creator metadata from a PDF file using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileInfo without loading the entire document.

read-pdf-modification-date.title: Read and Format PDF Modification Date
read-pdf-modification-date.description: Shows how to retrieve the ModDate metadata from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileInfo, convert the PDF date string to a .NET‑compatible format, and display it in a readable form.

update-pdf-author-metadata.title: Update PDF Author Metadata with PdfFileInfo
update-pdf-author-metadata.description: Shows how to set the Author property of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileInfo and persist the changes to a new file.

update-pdf-title-metadata.title: Update PDF Title Metadata Using PdfFileInfo
update-pdf-title-metadata.description: Shows how to change the Title metadata of a PDF with the PdfFileInfo facade and save the updated document to a new file.

set-pdf-keywords-metadata.title: Set PDF Keywords Metadata and Verify with PdfFileInfo
set-pdf-keywords-metadata.description: Demonstrates how to set the Keywords metadata field of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileInfo, save the updated file, and verify the value.

set-pdf-creator-metadata.title: Set PDF Creator Metadata Using PdfFileInfo
set-pdf-creator-metadata.description: Shows how to assign a custom Creator value to a PDF via Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileInfo and persist the change to a new file.

add-custom-metadata-to-pdf.title: Add Custom Metadata to PDF using PdfFileInfo
add-custom-metadata-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to add a custom metadata entry to a PDF file with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileInfo and save the updated document.

retrieve-custom-pdf-metadata-projectcode.title: Retrieve Custom PDF Metadata (ProjectCode)
retrieve-custom-pdf-metadata-projectcode.description: Demonstrates how to read a custom metadata entry named "ProjectCode" from a PDF file using the Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileInfo class.

add-custom-metadata-field-to-pdf.title: Add Custom Metadata Field to PDF
add-custom-metadata-field-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to add a custom metadata field "ReviewedBy" to a PDF using PdfFileInfo and persist the changes to a new file.

retrieve-reviewedby-metadata.title: Retrieve Custom Metadata 'ReviewedBy' from PDF
retrieve-reviewedby-metadata.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileInfo to read a custom metadata property named "ReviewedBy" from a PDF document and log its value.

add-department-metadata-to-pdfs.title: Add Department Metadata to PDFs
add-department-metadata-to-pdfs.description: Shows how to loop through PDF files, set a custom "Department" metadata field using PdfFileInfo, and save the updated PDFs to a separate folder.

add-or-update-custom-metadata-field.title: Add or Update Custom Metadata Field in PDF
add-or-update-custom-metadata-field.description: Shows how to preserve existing PDF metadata and add or update a custom property using the PdfFileInfo facade.

remove-custom-metadata-field.title: Remove Custom Metadata Field from PDF
remove-custom-metadata-field.description: Loads a PDF, clears the value of a custom metadata entry named "ObsoleteField" using SetMetaInfo, and saves the updated document to a new file.

read-confidential-metadata-from-pdf.title: Read Custom 'Confidential' Metadata from PDF
read-confidential-metadata-from-pdf.description: Shows how to open a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, verify that a custom metadata key exists, and safely read its value.

add-custom-timestamp-metadata-to-pdf.title: Add Custom Timestamp Metadata to PDF
add-custom-timestamp-metadata-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to add a custom metadata field "LastUpdated" with the current UTC timestamp to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileInfo.

update-pdf-metadata-save-new-file.title: Update PDF Metadata and Save to New File
update-pdf-metadata-save-new-file.description: Shows how to modify PDF metadata (title, author, subject, keywords) using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileInfo and persist the changes to a new PDF document.

update-pdf-metadata-add-page.title: Update PDF Metadata and Add a Blank Page
update-pdf-metadata-add-page.description: Shows how to read and modify PDF metadata with PdfFileInfo, add a blank page using Document, and persist the changes while correctly disposing the objects.

backup-pdf-update-metadata.title: Backup PDF and Update Metadata with PdfFileInfo
backup-pdf-update-metadata.description: Demonstrates creating a backup of a PDF file and then modifying its metadata (title, author, subject, keywords) using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileInfo class.

update-pdf-metadata-audit.title: Update PDF Metadata and Log Changes to CSV
update-pdf-metadata-audit.description: Demonstrates how to read existing PDF metadata, replace it with new values using Aspose.Pdf, and record the original and new values to a CSV audit file.

handle-readonly-file-errors-saving-pdf-m.title: Handle Read‑Only File Errors When Saving PDF Metadata
handle-readonly-file-errors-saving-pdf-m.description: Demonstrates modifying PDF metadata with PdfFileInfo and robustly handling IOException or UnauthorizedAccessException caused by a read‑only output file.

update-pdf-metadata-using-memory-stream.title: Update PDF Metadata Using Memory Stream
update-pdf-metadata-using-memory-stream.description: Shows how to load a PDF into a MemoryStream, modify its metadata with PdfFileInfo, and save the updated PDF to a new file.

update-pdf-keywords-metadata.title: Update PDF Keywords Metadata Using PdfFileInfo
update-pdf-keywords-metadata.description: Shows how to open a PDF from a stream with PdfFileInfo, change the Keywords metadata, and save the modified document to a new file.

update-pdf-author-metadata-conditional.title: Update PDF Author Metadata Conditionally
update-pdf-author-metadata-conditional.description: Shows how to read the Author metadata of a PDF, set it only when the field is empty, and save the updated document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

retrieve-custom-pdf-metadata-alphabetica.title: Retrieve and Display Custom PDF Metadata Alphabetically
retrieve-custom-pdf-metadata-alphabetica.description: The example loads a PDF, extracts all custom metadata keys, sorts them alphabetically, and prints each key with its value using Aspose.Pdf and the PdfFileInfo facade.

merge-xmp-metadata-with-pdf-file-info.title: Merge XMP Metadata with PDF File Info
merge-xmp-metadata-with-pdf-file-info.description: Demonstrates how to combine standard PDF document information (title, author) with an XMP metadata packet and save the merged metadata to a new PDF file.

read-pdf-version-using-pdffileinfo.title: Read PDF Version Using PdfFileInfo
read-pdf-version-using-pdffileinfo.description: Demonstrates how to retrieve the PDF version number from a file using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileInfo.

export-pdf-metadata-to-json.title: Export PDF Metadata to JSON
export-pdf-metadata-to-json.description: Shows how to read metadata from each PDF in a folder using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileInfo and serialize the collected information into a JSON file.

import-json-metadata-to-pdf.title: Import JSON Metadata and Apply to PDFs using PdfFileInfo
import-json-metadata-to-pdf.description: The example reads a JSON file containing standard and custom metadata, maps the values to a PdfFileInfo object, and saves a new PDF with the updated metadata. It demonstrates handling of both built‑in PDF properties and custom key/value pairs.

apply-metadata-parallel-to-pdfs.title: Apply Metadata to Multiple PDFs in Parallel
apply-metadata-parallel-to-pdfs.description: Demonstrates how to set the Title, Author, and Keywords of several PDF files concurrently using the Task Parallel Library and Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

thread-safe-pdf-metadata-update.title: Thread‑Safe PDF Metadata Update with PdfFileInfo
thread-safe-pdf-metadata-update.description: Shows how to modify PDF metadata concurrently using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileInfo, giving each parallel thread its own instance for safe processing.

validate-set-pdf-metadata-with-regex.title: Validate and Set PDF Metadata with Regex
validate-set-pdf-metadata-with-regex.description: Demonstrates how to validate metadata strings using a regular expression and then apply them to a PDF file via Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileInfo facade.

read-custom-pdf-metadata-null-handling.title: Read Custom PDF Metadata with Null Handling
read-custom-pdf-metadata-null-handling.description: Shows how to retrieve custom metadata from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileInfo and gracefully handle missing or empty values.

update-pdf-subject-metadata.title: Update PDF Subject Metadata using PdfFileInfo
update-pdf-subject-metadata.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with PdfFileInfo, changing its Subject metadata, and saving the updated document to a new file.

set-pdf-language-using-pdffileinfo.title: Set PDF Language Property Using PdfFileInfo
set-pdf-language-using-pdffileinfo.description: Demonstrates how to set the document language to "en-US" via the PdfFileInfo facade and save the updated PDF.

set-pdfa-compliance-using-pdffileinfo.title: Set PDF/A Compliance Using PdfFileInfo
set-pdfa-compliance-using-pdffileinfo.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF to PDF/A‑1b and enforcing strict validation with PdfFileInfo to produce an archival‑compliant document.

set-pdf-document-id-using-pdffileinfo.title: Set PDF Document ID Using PdfFileInfo
set-pdf-document-id-using-pdffileinfo.description: Demonstrates how to generate a GUID and store it as custom metadata (DocumentID) in a PDF using the PdfFileInfo facade.
